songs.title: Wherever You Will Go
feed: “Wherever You Will Go” by The Calling reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“Wherever You Will Go” by The Calling reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 2 spots to #1.
“Wherever You Will Go” by The Calling is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 200 streams units.

songs.title: Actually Romantic
feed: “Actually Romantic” by Taylor Swift reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, reentering at #2.
“Actually Romantic” by Taylor Swift is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 123 sales units.
“Actually Romantic” by Taylor Swift is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 315,945 total units.
